title: Lemony Crisp Syrian Chicken Bowl
description: A citrusy, crisp, leaf‑wrapped chicken simmered with makrut lime leaves, served over quinoa with fresh veggies for a post‑workout boost.

ingredients.name: makrut lime leaves
ingredients.notes: to wrap and steam the chicken

instructions: Preheat the oven to 190°C and prepare a steam basket.
Season the chicken breasts with salt, pepper, red pepper flakes, cumin, coriander, and paprika.
Wrap each chicken breast in two makrut lime leaves and secure with kitchen twine.
Place the wrapped chicken in the steam basket, add a splash of water, and steam for 15 minutes.
While the chicken steams, toss quinoa with lemon zest, lemon juice, tamarind paste, and a drizzle of olive oil.
In a skillet, heat the remaining olive oil and briefly sauté the bell pepper until crisp.
Arrange the quinoa base in a Korean brass bowl, top with steamed chicken, sautéed bell pepper, shredded cabbage, and fresh mint.
Serve immediately, ensuring the chicken remains wrapped for extra moisture and flavor.
